results.rendered_html:
anuśī 2 A.
1 To lie or sleep with, sleep along with; lie upon, close or along; lay oneself down; to adhere to or follow closely, cling or stick to; śayānaṃ cānuśete hi tiṣṭhaṃtamanutiṣṭhati . anudhāvati dhāvaṃtaṃ karma pūrvakṛtaṃ naraṃ ..  Subhāṣita .
2 To repent, grieve for; dattamiṣṭamapi nānvaśeta saḥ  Śi. 14. 45 ; purānuśete tava caṃcalaṃ manaḥ  Ki. 8. 8.
